description: Standardized output schema for targeted unlearning evaluation harness (Person B, CS 590NN)

model.description: HuggingFace model ID used for evaluation

edit_success.description: 1.0 if gen_after contains target_new (substring match); 0.0 otherwise

paraphrase_success.description: Fraction of paraphrase prompts where model outputs target_new after edit

over_extinction.description: OE_bleed: fraction of neighborhood prompts where edited model outputs target_new. Primary over-extinction signal. 0.0 = perfectly specific edit, 1.0 = catastrophic bleed.

neighborhood_preservation.description: Fraction of neighborhood prompts where model still outputs true answer after edit

locality_drop.description: MMLU accuracy drop (mmlu_before - mmlu_after). Positive = degradation, negative = improvement, null = not yet computed.

kl_final.description: Final KL divergence from circuit pipeline (Person A field, pass-through)

notes: over_extinction field was null in week3_harness_output.json — Person B fills this in Week 2
neighborhood_bleed and over_extinction are the same metric (OE_bleed) — aligned in Week 2
